detections.label: browser_goal_mismatch
detections.description: Agent selected 2:00 AM (data-time='02:00') while the user goal specified 2:00 PM. The 12-hour mismatch is confirmed by the final goal_check.

detections.label: ignored_ui_warning
detections.description: A timezone/early-morning warning was rendered in the DOM ('Did you mean 2:00 PM?') and captured in a screenshot, but the agent proceeded without acknowledging it.

detections.label: false_success_claim
detections.description: Agent reported success ('booked Tuesday at 2pm Pacific') with no final browser-state verification; the goal_check then failed.

ses_acmemeet_tue2pm.root_cause: The agent never verifies the selected DOM time against the user goal before claiming completion, and it does not gate completion on visible warning text. It clicked the 2:00 slot (rendered as 2:00 AM) and treated the action's 200/no-error outcome as success.
ses_acmemeet_tue2pm.observed_final_state: Tuesday, June 23 at 2:00 AM PDT selected; timezone warning visible; agent claimed success; goal verification failed.

detections.label: browser_goal_mismatch
detections.description: Selected 3:00 AM instead of the requested 3:00 PM.

detections.label: ignored_ui_warning
detections.description: Early-morning slot warning visible and ignored.

ses_book_thu3pm.root_cause: Same AM/PM selection bug as the representative booking incident: no final time verification against the goal.
ses_book_thu3pm.observed_final_state: Thursday 3:00 AM PDT selected; agent claimed success; goal check failed.

detections.label: ignored_ui_warning
detections.description: The page stated 'All sales final. Non-refundable.' The agent added the ticket anyway.

detections.label: browser_goal_mismatch
detections.description: User asked for a refundable ticket; selected ticket is non-refundable.

ses_refund_ticket.root_cause: Agent does not parse on-page policy warnings before committing to a selection.
ses_refund_ticket.observed_final_state: Non-refundable Early Bird ticket added to cart; 'All sales final' warning ignored.

detections.label: false_success_claim
detections.description: Agent claimed the form submitted while required-field errors remained visible.

ses_form_submit.root_cause: No post-submit validation of the page state; the agent treated the click as success.
ses_form_submit.observed_final_state: Form not submitted; 'Company name is required' and 'Phone is required' errors visible.

detections.label: wrong_element_clicked
detections.description: Clicked 'Delete workspace' (button.danger) instead of the adjacent 'Disable integration' control.

ses_delete_workspace.root_cause: Agent matched on partial button text and selected an adjacent destructive control; only the runtime guardrail prevented data loss.
ses_delete_workspace.observed_final_state: Delete-workspace confirmation modal opened; guardrail blocked the action.

detections.label: forbidden_action_attempted
detections.description: User said 'do not purchase'; agent clicked 'Proceed to payment' and reached the payment confirmation step.

ses_no_purchase.root_cause: Agent did not encode the negative constraint ('do not purchase') as a hard stop before advancing checkout steps.
ses_no_purchase.observed_final_state: Payment confirmation screen reached; guardrail flagged forbidden action.

detections.label: goal_mismatch
detections.description: Retrieved policy says apparel is refundable within 30 days; the order is 9 days old, yet the agent answered 'non-refundable'.

detections.label: false_confidence
detections.description: Agent answered with high confidence despite low policy-grounding score (0.18).

ses_support_refund.root_cause: Answer was not grounded against the retrieved returns policy; the agent ignored the refund window from the order lookup.
ses_support_refund.observed_final_state: Customer told order #88241 is non-refundable, contradicting the 30-day apparel refund policy.

detections.label: false_success_claim
detections.description: Agent claimed the test was fixed, but the second pytest run still reports '1 failed' and the edit touched an unrelated file.

ses_coding_falsefix.root_cause: Agent edited the wrong file (checkout_helpers.py instead of checkout_total.py) and reported success without checking the final test result.
ses_coding_falsefix.observed_final_state: Tests still failing (1 failed, 7 passed); relevant file unchanged.

detections.label: intent_drift
detections.description: The user corrected the goal to cancellation, but the agent retained the order-status intent.

detections.label: false_success_claim
detections.description: The agent said the user was all set without calling cancellation or refund tools.

ses_voice_refund_false_success.root_cause: The agent did not reclassify intent after the user's correction, continued the order-status flow, and treated a conversational ending as goal completion.
ses_voice_refund_false_success.observed_final_state: Order remained active, no refund was started, and the call ended with a false success claim.
